channel.title: NAAJ Siddiqui, C Danciu, SA Ashraf, A Moin, R Singh, M Alreshidi, M Patel, S Jahan, S Kumar, MIM Alkhinjar, R Badraoui, M Snoussi, M Adnan | PlatCOVID

item.title: Plants-Derived Biomolecules as Potent Antiviral Phytomedicines: New Insights on Ethnobotanical Evidences against Coronaviruses.
